mapper.update: UPDATE t_lh_month_plan_surplus tlp JOIN (SELECT YEAR AS `YEAR`, MONTH AS `MONTH`, FACTORY_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, SPEC_CODE, SUM(DAY_FINISH_QTY) AS MONTH_FINISH_QTY FROM t_lh_day_finish_qty WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, FACTORY_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, SPEC_CODE) tdfq ON tlp.`YEAR` = tdfq.`YEAR` AND tlp.`MONTH` = tdfq.`MONTH` AND tlp.FACTORY_CODE = tdfq.FACTORY_CODE AND tlp.PRODUCT_CODE = tdfq.PRODUCT_CODE AND tlp.SPEC_CODE = tdfq.SPEC_CODE SET tlp.MONTH_FINISH_QTY = tdfq.MONTH_FINISH_QTY, tlp.MONTH_REMAIN_QTY = tlp.MONTH_PLAN_QTY - tdfq.MONTH_FINISH_QTY WHERE tlp.IS_DELETE = 0 AND tlp.YEAR = #{scheduleYear} AND tlp.`MONTH` = #{scheduleMonth}

UPDATE t_lh_day_finish_qty tldfq JOIN (SELECT SCHEDULE_DATE AS FINISH_DATE, FACTORY_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, SPEC_CODE, SUM( IFNULL(CLASS1_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS2_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS3_FINISH_QTY, 0) ) AS DAY_FINISH_QTY FROM t_lh_schedule_result WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 GROUP BY SCHEDULE_DATE, FACTORY_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, SPEC_CODE) tdfq ON tldfq.FINISH_DATE = tdfq.FINISH_DATE AND tldfq.FACTORY_CODE = tdfq.FACTORY_CODE AND tldfq.PRODUCT_CODE = tdfq.PRODUCT_CODE AND tldfq.SPEC_CODE = tdfq.SPEC_CODE SET tldfq.DAY_FINISH_QTY = tdfq.DAY_FINISH_QTY, tldfq.YEAR = #{scheduleYear}, tldfq.MONTH = #{scheduleMonth} WHERE tldfq.IS_DELETE = 0 AND tldfq.FINISH_DATE = #{scheduleDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_lh_day_finish_qty (YEAR,MONTH,FINISH_DATE, FACTORY_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, SPEC_CODE, DAY_FINISH_QTY, IS_DELETE) SELECT #{scheduleYear},#{scheduleMonth},sr.SCHEDULE_DATE, sr.FACTORY_CODE, sr.PRODUCT_CODE, sr.SPEC_CODE, SUM( IFNULL(CLASS1_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS2_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS3_FINISH_QTY, 0) ), 0 FROM t_lh_schedule_result sr WHERE sr.SCHEDULE_DATE = #{scheduleDate} AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_lh_day_finish_qty tldfq WHERE tldfq.IS_DELETE = 0 AND tldfq.FINISH_DATE = sr.SCHEDULE_DATE AND tldfq.FACTORY_CODE = sr.FACTORY_CODE AND tldfq.PRODUCT_CODE = sr.PRODUCT_CODE AND tldfq.SPEC_CODE = sr.SPEC_CODE)) GROUP BY sr.SCHEDULE_DATE, sr.FACTORY_CODE, sr.PRODUCT_CODE, sr.SPEC_CODE
